hero.title: From Intent to Reality
hero.subtitle: Intenture is a formal semantic linguo-graphical language for intent explication - designed for precise human-AI interaction in creating, analyzing, developing, and realizing intent.

features.title: Why Intenture?
features.subtitle: A structured approach to human-AI collaboration that preserves the integrity of your intent through every stage of realization.

dualLayer.title: Dual-Layer Syntax
dualLayer.description: Human-facing natural language and AI-facing canonical structure - one intent, two representations, perfect semantic alignment.

lifecycle.title: 8-State Lifecycle
lifecycle.description: From Dream to Realization - a non-linear lifecycle model with Critical Readiness Threshold ensuring your intent is truly ready before execution.

canvas.title: Intenture Canvas
canvas.description: Single Source of Truth with 15 structured blocks - Critical, Supporting, and Development layers that capture every dimension of your intent.

aiProtocol.title: AI Interpretation Protocol
aiProtocol.description: 9-step pipeline from capture to realization, with built-in conflict resolution, assumption confirmation, and safety-first constraint handling.

visual.title: Visual Notation
visual.description: 11 canonical primitives with distinct shapes and colors - Intent circles, Actor hexagons, Constraint diamonds - for clear diagramming.

patterns.title: Pattern Library
patterns.description: Reference patterns for Health Care Teams, AI Agents, and Products/Services - ready-made templates for common intent structures.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Intenture transforms fuzzy ideas into actionable, AI-interpretable structures through a systematic explication process.

step1.title: Express Your Intent
step1.description: Start with natural language - describe what you want to achieve in your own words. No special syntax required.

step2.title: AI Explicates
step2.description: The AI interpretation protocol extracts, normalizes, and structures your intent into the canonical Intenture form.

step3.title: Review & Refine
step3.description: The Canvas reveals gaps, contradictions, and assumptions. Iterate until your intent passes the Critical Readiness Threshold.

step4.title: Realize
step4.description: A fully explicated intent becomes the foundation for specs, backlogs, workflows - whatever your realization requires.

cta.title: Ready to Explicate Your Intent?
cta.subtitle: Join the community building the bridge between human vision and AI execution.

footer.description: A formal semantic linguo-graphical language for intent explication - designed for precise human-AI interaction in creating, analyzing, developing, and realizing intent.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Complete reference for the Intenture language v1.5

examples.title: Examples Library
examples.subtitle: End-to-end examples demonstrating the full Intenture explication process - from human-facing input to AI-facing canonical form.

healthCare.title: Health Care Team
healthCare.description: Coordinated multi-expert health program with nutritionist, endocrinologist, cardiologist, chef, and fitness trainer.

aiAgent.title: AI Agent
aiAgent.description: Specialized AI agent for client request processing with safety boundaries and escalation protocols.

productService.title: Product / Service
productService.description: A meta-example: a service that helps people formulate their intents for AI interaction.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Intenture is open source. Join us in evolving the formal language for intent explication in human-AI interaction.

github.title: GitHub
github.description: Star the repo, report issues, submit pull requests. The language specification and all examples are open source.

discord.title: Discord
discord.description: Join the conversation. Discuss patterns, share your intentures, get help from the community.

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.description: Write new patterns, improve the spec, add examples, translate documentation, or build tools around Intenture.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.description: See what's coming in v1.6 and beyond - hierarchical Canvas, rollback mechanisms, value prioritization, formal validation, and more.

v1.title: Canvas Scalability (v1.6)
v1.description: Hierarchical Canvas with contains relation for large projects. Built on top of Portfolio: contains becomes a special inter-intenture relation with constraint inheritance, value aggregation, and readiness roll-up.

v2.title: Intenture Portfolio
v2.description: Graph of related intenture with 5 typed inter-intenture relations: depends_on, enables, conflicts_with, shares_constraint_with, shares_actor_with. Delivered in v1.5.

v3.title: AI Assumption Safety
v3.description: Assumption Gate rule, Accepted Assumption status, Confirm Assumptions step in AI Protocol. Delivered in v1.4.

v4.title: Structured Constraint Format
v4.description: New [resource] constraint type, optional machine-readable fields for [budget], [timeline], and [resource] constraints. Delivered in v1.4.

v5.title: Formal Validation Schema
v5.description: JSON Schema for automated AI-facing form validation.

v6.title: Visual Diagrams & Graphics
v6.description: Full set of canonical diagrams, visual primitives, and interactive graphical elements for the linguo-graphical language.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.subtitle: Version history and release notes for the Intenture language.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Updates, insights, and stories from the Intenture community.
blog.comingSoon: Blog posts coming soon. Stay tuned!
